# Aniwordle

> Free daily anime guessing games. Identify a mystery anime character from a
> blurred image, or play the anime wordle (animedle) where each guess reveals
> matching attributes. New puzzles every day, no sign-up required.

Aniwordle is a fan-made web game site in the anime quiz / daily guessing-game
genre (similar in format to Wordle). All games share one curated dataset of
popular anime characters and refresh daily at midnight UTC.

## Games

- [Guess the Character](https://aniwordle.com/guess-the-character): Name the anime
  character from a progressively unblurred image. Six guesses, with hints
  (gender, debut year, role, anime). Daily puzzle plus unlimited practice.
- [Anime Wordle (Animedle)](https://aniwordle.com/anime-wordle): Guess the daily
  mystery character; an attribute grid (anime, gender, role, genres, debut year,
  popularity) shows how each guess compares to the answer.

## About

- [Home](https://aniwordle.com/): Overview of all games.
- [About](https://aniwordle.com/about): What Aniwordle is and how it works.
- [Privacy](https://aniwordle.com/privacy): Privacy and data handling.

## Notes

Character data and images are sourced from public anime databases (AniList) for
editorial/fan use and remain the property of their respective rights holders.
